artifacts.description: Typed, versioned definition of a multi-step automation. Compiles to a stable execution graph the runtime can replay from events.
artifacts.trust_boundary: plugin-authored static definition; loaded read-only at runtime; never model-authored during a run

artifacts.description: Atomic unit of execution inside a Phase. Three variants (synthesis, checkpoint, dispatch) discriminated by kind.
artifacts.trust_boundary: plugin-authored static definition; loaded read-only at runtime

artifacts.description: Named, ordered grouping of Steps within a Workflow. May align with canonical spine or be workflow-specific.
artifacts.trust_boundary: plugin-authored static definition; loaded read-only at runtime

artifacts.description: Append-only sequence of events for a single Run. First event is bootstrap; sequence is 0-based contiguous; closure is singleton with no post-closure events.
writers: circuit-next engine (event append during run execution)
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local persisted state; append-only; never truncated in normal operation

artifacts.description: In-memory {log, snapshot} aggregate used for internal consistency checks. Not persisted. The log persists at run.log (events.ndjson); the snapshot persists at run.snapshot (state.json). RunProjection exists only to state the invariants that bind the two in memory (events_consumed equals log length; bootstrap-frozen fields match; closure-to-status mapping is total by construction).
artifacts.trust_boundary: engine-computed in-memory aggregate; always recomputable from run.log; never authoritative over the log; never persisted to disk (Slice 26a binding split — run.snapshot owns state.json)

artifacts.description: Reducer-derived run-local state checkpoint persisted at <circuit-next-run-root>/state.json. Always recomputable from run.log by replaying events; never independently authored. Does NOT include the event log itself — for the in-memory {log, snapshot} aggregate see run.projection. Slice 27c lands the reducer-derived writer and byte-match gate.
writers: circuit-next engine (reducer-derived snapshot writer; authored by Slice 27c)
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local derived state; no runtime writer exists before Slice 27c. When Slice 27c lands, state.json will be written only by the reducer (never by step executors), and a byte-match against a fresh reducer pass over run.log will be enforced at re-entry. Before that slice lands, the authority-graph binding declares the intended trust boundary; runtime enforcement is not yet in place.

artifacts.description: Typed override value (model, effort, skills, rigor, invocation_options) contributed by one config layer. JSON-safe invocation_options; strict unknown-key rejection.
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local at user-global/project/invocation layers; plugin-author-signed at the defaults layer; engine validates .strict() key closure and ghost-provenance rejection at parse time. Composition produces selection.resolution (separate artifact).

artifacts.description: Result of layering overrides under 7-tuple precedence. Identity-keyed applied chain; category-level precedence; ghost-provenance rejection.
artifacts.trust_boundary: engine-computed; always reconstructable from ordered overrides

artifacts.description: Config-layer map of custom adapter name -> CustomAdapterDescriptor. Registry-key to descriptor-name parity is enforced; reserved names are disjoint.
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local at user-global/project/invocation layers; plugin-author-signed at the defaults layer; engine validates reserved-name disjointness, own-property closure, and registry-key/descriptor-name parity at parse time.

artifacts.description: Pre-resolution pointer into the adapter registry or a built-in adapter. Three variants (built-in, named, inline custom). Not valid in the event log.
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local at user-global/project/invocation layers; plugin-author-signed at the defaults layer; engine validates named-ref registry closure during resolution. MUST NOT appear in run.log (resolved-form-only per ADAPTER-I10).

artifacts.description: Post-resolution adapter: either a built-in enum variant or an inlined CustomAdapterDescriptor. Named references MUST NOT appear here. Shape written to DispatchStartedEvent.adapter.
artifacts.trust_boundary: engine-computed; authoritative for dispatch; replay-stable (named refs forbidden by ADAPTER-I10)

artifacts.description: Top-level Config record contributed by one config layer. Carries schema_version (literal 1), a DispatchConfig (sub-artifact adapter.registry), a record of per-circuit CircuitOverride (sub-artifact config.circuit-override), and a defaults object carrying a SelectionOverride. Surplus keys rejected transitively via .strict().
dangerous_sinks: surplus-key rejection at config root and nested defaults
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local at user-global/project/invocation layers; plugin-author-signed at the defaults layer; engine validates .strict() key closure + schema_version literal at parse time. Composition of multiple layers is out of v0.1 scope (see specs/contracts/config.md Scope).

artifacts.description: Layer-identity wrapper around a Config. Carries ConfigLayer (default | user-global | project | invocation), an optional source_path, and a validated Config. Distinct from the merged effective configuration at dispatch time (which is not a LayeredConfig).
backing_paths: in-memory wrapper around config.root (no standalone on-disk form)
artifacts.trust_boundary: engine-computed wrapper around an already-validated config.root; each layer's inner config is re-validated through config.root before wrapping. source_path is advisory (v0.1 does not constrain filesystem validity).

artifacts.description: Per-workflow override slot stored in Config.circuits[workflow_id]. Currently carries an optional SelectionOverride; reserved for additional per-circuit override categories in v0.2. Strict-key rejection forbids smuggling new categories without a contract change.
dangerous_sinks: strict-key rejection (forbids `skills: string[]` v0.0 shortcut reintroduction)
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local at user-global/project/invocation layers; plugin-author-signed at the defaults layer. Record-key shape (WorkflowId) is validated by ids primitive; catalog-closure of the WorkflowId against installed workflows is NOT enforced at v0.1 (same posture as adapter.registry closure notes).

artifacts.description: circuit-next catalog entry for a plugin skill's L1 frontmatter. Represents the machine-readable descriptor a selection resolver can bind by SkillId and a catalog compiler can enumerate. Prose body (L2) and extra files (L3) are out of scope.
readers: circuit-next engine (selection resolver, skill set composition)
backing_paths: <plugin>/catalog/skills.json (compiled catalog projection, one SkillDescriptor per skill)
artifacts.trust_boundary: plugin-authored static descriptor; loaded read-only at catalog-compile time; never model-authored during a run

artifacts.description: circuit-next continuity handoff record. Carries goal, next, state, and debt narrative across session boundaries; identity derived from record_id which is used as a filename stem.
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local persisted state; may contain model-authored narrative and path-derived identity
artifacts.migration_policy: deferred; no transparent runtime parse of old Circuit records. If imported later, a separate migration-source contract is required.

artifacts.description: circuit-next continuity resolver/index artifact. Points at the pending record and the current attached run; determines which record is authoritative for resume. Singleton on disk — no in-body identity.
artifacts.trust_boundary: operator-local persisted state; determines which record is authoritative for resume
artifacts.migration_policy: deferred; no transparent runtime parse of old Circuit index. If imported later, a separate migration-source contract is required.
